concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan (code/, data/, tests/, state/)' is too coarse — does not name specific directories/files to create. Atomizer will split this.
T003 'Configure linting and formatting tools (ruff, black)' lacks concrete deliverable — does not specify config file paths (e.g., ruff.toml, pyproject.toml).
T027 'Documentation updates in docs/ and quickstart.md' is vague — does not specify which documents, what content, or acceptance criteria.
T028 'Code cleanup and refactoring' has no concrete deliverable or verification method — implementer cannot execute deterministically.
T031 'Update state/ projects YAML with artifact hashes' assumes hash generation exists — no task creates content hashes per Constitution Principle V.
T012 'Add logging for excluded issues' does not specify log file path or format — implementer lacks verification criteria.
